entry.speaker: Varn
entry.text: You have come this far. I expected nothing less.

responses.text: I don't want to fight you.

no_choice.speaker: Varn
no_choice.text: Nor I. But the chains demand it. You have walked through everything the dungeon placed before you — and here, at the end, only one of us can hold the line. That is not malice. That is structure.

knew_it_would.speaker: Varn
knew_it_would.text: From the moment you refused me. I do not blame you for it. But consequences do not require blame. You made your choice. Now stand to it.

end_this.speaker: Varn
end_this.text: As you say. The chains were always going to lead here. I am ready.
